title: Charred Fish Gyoza Tacos
description: A unique fusion of Mexican and Asian flavors, these tacos combine charred fish, polish sausage, and pan-fried gyoza for a delicious and spicy meal.
instructions: 1. Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced polish sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add the flaked charred fish to the skillet and cook until heated through, about 2-3 minutes.
5. In a large bowl, combine the cooked sausage, fish, chili powder, cumin, and salt. Stir to combine.
6. Meanwhile, pan-fry the gyoza wrappers according to package instructions.
7. Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.

8. Assemble the tacos by placing a few pieces of the fish and sausage mixture onto a tortilla, followed by a few pieces of pan-fried gyoza, a sprinkle of cilantro, and a dollop of crema and sliced avocado.
